keywords: threaded rod, all thread, stud bolt, material selection, load ratings, construction fasteners

body.en:
Threaded rod (also called all-thread or stud bolt) is a fastener with continuous threads along its entire length. This versatile product serves countless applications in construction, mining, manufacturing, and maintenance.

Threaded rod is available in various materials, diameters, lengths, and thread specifications to meet diverse application requirements.

Common specifications:

Metric: M6, M8, M10, M12, M16, M20, M24, M30, M36
Inch: 1/4" through 2" and larger
Lengths: Typically 1m to 3m, custom lengths available
Grades: 4.6, 8.8, 10.9 for carbon steel; A2, A4 for stainless

Threaded rod is typically cut to length from longer stock, but TradeGo offers standard lengths ready for immediate use.

TradeGo supplies threaded rod in various materials and coatings for African construction, mining, and industrial applications.
body.zh: 螺杆（也称为全螺纹或柱螺栓）是一种沿整个长度连续攻丝的紧固件。这种多功能产品在建筑、采矿、制造和维护中有无数应用。

body.en:
Threaded rod materials must be selected based on strength requirements and environmental conditions:

Carbon Steel: Most common choice for general applications. Zinc-plated for indoor use, hot-dip galvanized for outdoor and corrosive environments.

Stainless Steel A2 (304): Excellent corrosion resistance for indoor and outdoor applications. Suitable for most environments not involving chlorides.

Stainless Steel A4 (316): Superior chloride corrosion resistance for coastal and marine applications. Recommended for beachfront construction and offshore installations.

Alloy Steel (ASTM A193 B7): High-strength option for demanding applications including pressure vessels, high-temperature piping, and heavy machinery.

Coatings for carbon steel threaded rod:

Zinc Plating: Standard indoor corrosion protection. Cost-effective for controlled environments.
Hot-Dip Galvanizing: 40-60 micrometer zinc coating provides excellent outdoor durability. Essential for outdoor construction in African climates.
Dacromet: High corrosion resistance with good temperature performance. Suitable for demanding environments.
Black Oxide: Cosmetic finish with minimal protection. Indoor use only.

For African applications, hot-dip galvanized threaded rod is recommended for outdoor construction due to humid tropical conditions and salt exposure in coastal areas.
body.zh: 螺杆材料必须根据强度要求和环境条件选择：碳钢最常见，锌镀层用于室内，热镀锌用于室外和腐蚀环境。不锈钢A2(304)具有良好的耐腐蚀性，A4(316)具有出色的耐氯化物腐蚀性能。

body.en:
Threaded rod serves many construction and industrial applications:

Structural Connections:
- Anchor rod for concrete foundations
- Boundary rods for structural steel connections
- Hanger rods for suspended ceilings and mechanical systems
- Bracing rods for structural stability

Mechanical Installations:
- Pump and motor mounting
- Conveyor support structures
- HVAC equipment mounting
- Generator and transformer foundations

Plumbing and Pipe Support:
- Pipe hangers and supports
- Sprinkler system mounting
- Plumbing fixture installation
- DWV (drain, waste, vent) system supports

Mining Applications:
- Ground support reinforcement
- Equipment anchoring in processing plants
- Conveyor structure connections
- Tunnel and shaft construction

Marine and Coastal:
- Dock and pier construction
- Seawall and breakwater installations
- Marina infrastructure
- Offshore platform mounting

Threaded rod is often used with nuts and washers on both ends to create adjustable connections or anchor points. This adjustability makes threaded rod ideal for applications where precise length cannot be determined in advance.
body.zh: 螺杆适用于许多建筑和工业应用：结构连接、机械安装、管道支撑、采矿应用以及海洋和沿海应用。

body.en:
Understanding threaded rod load capacity is essential for safe applications:

 tensile strength ratings by grade:
M10 Grade 4.6: 23.2 kN ultimate, 15.5 kN working (3:1 safety factor)
M12 Grade 4.6: 33.7 kN ultimate, 22.5 kN working
M16 Grade 4.6: 62.3 kN ultimate, 41.5 kN working
M20 Grade 8.8: 122 kN ultimate, 81 kN working
M24 Grade 8.8: 176 kN ultimate, 117 kN working

Critical engineering considerations:

Thread engagement: Minimum thread engagement of 1 diameter for full strength (ISO 898). For anchor applications, 2-3 diameters into concrete is recommended.

Connection design: Threaded rod in tension requires nut and washer on both ends for proper load distribution.

Shear loading: Threaded rod has lower shear strength than tensile strength. Design connections to avoid shear loading where possible.

Combined loading: Analyze both tensile and shear forces. Use interaction formulas for combined loading conditions.

Fatigue: Dynamic loading requires consideration of fatigue life. Consider using fine thread for better fatigue resistance.

For critical structural applications, consult a licensed structural engineer. TradeGo provides technical data but engineering responsibility rests with the designer.
body.zh: 了解螺杆负载能力对于安全应用至关重要。关键是：螺纹啮合需要至少1倍直径（ISO 898），连接设计需要螺母和垫圈分配负载，剪切加载应避免，组合加载需要分析。

q.en: What length threaded rod should I order?

a.en: Order slightly longer than needed, then cut to exact length on-site. Standard lengths of 1m, 2m, and 3m cover most requirements. For custom lengths, contact TradeGo for availability.

q.en: Can threaded rod be used for underground mining support?

a.en: Yes, but use appropriate material for the environment. Hot-dip galvanized or stainless steel for humid underground conditions. Some mining applications require specialized corrosion-resistant coatings.

q.en: What's the difference between fine thread and coarse thread?

a.en: Coarse thread (standard metric) is easier to assemble and provides better fatigue resistance. Fine thread offers better adjustment precision and higher load capacity in the same diameter.

q.en: How do I cut threaded rod on site?

a.en: Use a hacksaw with fine-tooth blade, angle grinder with cutting disc, or pipe cutter for smaller diameters. Wear safety glasses and protect threads from debris.
Carbon steel threaded rod can be welded using appropriate procedures. Remove any plating or coating before welding. Stainless rod requires specialized welding techniques.

cta.en: Contact TradeGo for threaded rod and fastening solutions. Email: sales@tradego-fasteners.com
